prompt: RENDER PHASE of comprehend-visualise (read .claude/skills/comprehend-visualise/SKILL.md + appydave-plugins/appydave/skills/mochaccino/references/usage-patterns.md first). DATA ALREADY EXISTS: .mochaccino/data/05-dark-factory.json (the Dark Factory overview, authored by Marshall from the approved ASCII diagram). Render it as ONE on-brand Mochaccino design that explains the Dark Factory to an external colleague (high-level — the IDEA, not the plumbing). SHAPE = a system map / diagram that mirrors the structure: YOU →(plain language)→ MARSHALL (the conductor) → THREE branches: (1) THE LOOP — dispatch a Swagger (isolated worker) → does job → returns result → Marshall checks; (2) MILLWRIGHT — the mechanic — asks 'what FORM of machine fits?' → BUILDS the machine — with its LESSON emphasised as a callout: 'Build the MACHINE, not the one-off output — the factory builds its own tools'; (3) OBSERVABILITY RING — the apps (Switchboard, AngelSentinel, Watchtower, AppyCtrl) that measure what works/doesn't. Then a bottom band WHAT IT MAKES: point at CODE or PROSE → COMPREHEND → VISUALISE → provenanced visuals (e.g. cortex → 'how a brain works'). Make Millwright/the-mechanic visually prominent (it's the part David most wants seen). HARD RULES (Mochaccino): write to the EXISTING dark-factory .mochaccino/ workspace as design designs/05-dark-factory/index.html; the HTML FETCHES ../../data/05-dark-factory.json (MVC, never inline); Orient strip atop (why=explain the factory to a colleague / who=external colleague like Martin / what-question=what is the Dark Factory and how does it work); light-mode primary, AppyDave brand (brown #342d2d, gold #ccba9d, yellow #ffde59 for the Millwright lesson callout, cream bg; fonts Bebas Neue/Oswald/Roboto); regenerate designs/index.html gallery (KEEP the existing groups + designs 01-04; add 05 under a group like 'Explaining the factory'); serve over http on the EXISTING :7422 server (do NOT start a new port — just write files, the server picks them up); verify with curl that /designs/05-dark-factory/ and /data/05-dark-factory.json both return 200. Report ONE line: the gallery URL + confirm 05 renders. Then complete run-next-workflow bookkeeping (run record in runs/ + move to done/ + reports/ handback — DO NOT skip these; the return-leg has been getting botched, get it right).
